MELSubItem.Title: Passenger Seats (includes all Configurations and Locations)

DispatchConditionRemarks.Para: For VN-A861, VN-A862, VN-A863, VN-A864, VN-A867, VN-A868, VN-A870, VN-A871 - Number Installed: 274
For VN-865, VN-A866, VN-A869 - Number Installed: 311
For VN-A872, VN-A873, VN-A874, VN-A877, VN-A878, VN-A879 - Number Installed: 367

ListItem.Para: Seat does not restrict access to any emergency exit, egress route, or main aisle.
The affected seat(s) is blocked and placarded "DO NOT OCCUPY".

Note.Para: A seat with an inoperative seat belt or shoulder harness is considered inoperative.
Affected seat(s) may include the seat(s) behind and/or adjacent outboard seats.
Inoperative seats do not affect the required number of flight attendants.

MELSubItem.Title: Positioning Controls for Taxi, Takeoff, and Landing (TTL) (Mechanical and/or Electrical)

DispatchConditionRemarks.Para: For VN-A861, VN-A862, VN-A863, VN-A864, VN-A867, VN-A868, VN-A870, VN-A871 - Number Installed: 274
For VN-865, VN-A866, VN-A869 - Number Installed: 311
For VN-A872, VN-A873, VN-A874, VN-A877, VN-A878, VN-A879 - Number Installed: 367
May be inoperative and seat occupied provided seat is secured in the taxi, takeoff, and landing (TTL) position.

MaintenanceProcedure.Para: Secure the associated seat in the taxi, takeoff, and landing (TTL) position (AMM DDG 25-25-02).

DispatchConditionRemarks.Para: For VN-A861, VN-A862, VN-A863, VN-A864, VN-A867, VN-A868, VN-A870, VN-A871 - Number Installed: 274
For VN-865, VN-A866, VN-A869 - Number Installed: 311
For VN-A872, VN-A873, VN-A874, VN-A877, VN-A878, VN-A879 - Number Installed: 367
May be inoperative and seat occupied provided seat is immovable in the taxi, takeoff, and landing (TTL) position.
For VN-A861, VN-A862, VN-A863, VN-A864, VN-A867, VN-A868, VN-A870, VN-A871 - Number Installed: 274
For VN-865, VN-A866, VN-A869 - Number Installed: 311
For VN-A872, VN-A873, VN-A874, VN-A879, VN-A877, VN-A878 - Number Installed: 367

ListItem.Para: Baggage is not stowed under seat with inoperative restraining system.
Associated seat is placarded "DO NOT STOW BAGGAGE UNDER THIS SEAT".
Alert cabin crew of inoperative restraining system.

OperationProcedure.Para: Identify to the cabin crew the seats with inoperative underseat baggage restraining system.

MELSubItem.Title: With Seat Positioning Controls for Taxi, Takeoff, and Landing (TTL) and/or Other Controls

DispatchConditionRemarks.Para: May be inoperative or missing and seat occupied provided:

ListItem.Para: Armrest does not restrict access to any emergency exit, egress route, or main aisle.
If armrest with seat control is missing or removed, seat is secured in taxi, takeoff, and landing (TTL) position.

MaintenanceProcedure.Para: If required, secure the associated seat in the taxi, takeoff, and landing (TTL) position (AMM DDG 25-25-02).

MELSubItem.Title: Without Seat Positioning Controls for Taxi, Takeoff, and Landing (TTL) and/or Other Controls

DispatchConditionRemarks.Para: May be inoperative or missing and seat occupied provided it does not restrict access to any emergency exit, egress route, or main aisle.
May be inoperative provided affected seat is blocked and placarded "DO NOT OCCUPY".

OperationNote.Para: - Do not use extension girts at seats with inflatable seatbelt.
- Don’t attach the child seat on a passenger seat equipped with an airbag or in the area of airbag deployment.
